text:
Part of etc.conf

ifconfig_sk0="inet 10.0.0.1 netmask 255.255.255.0"
cloned_interfaces="bridge0"
ifconfig_rl0="inet 192.168.1.1 netmask 255.255.255.0"
ifconfig_bridge0="addm rl0 addm wlan0 up"
ifconfig_wlan0="up"
hostapd_enable="YES"
wlans_ral0="wlan0"
create_args_wlan0="wlanmode hostap"
hostapd_enable="YES"
